operating_ranges.evidence: Type 1179 Controller Available Ranges: 10 sccm to 20000 sccm (N₂ equivalent)
Control Range: 2% to 100% of full scale
valve orifice in standard units is sized that with a pressure difference between inlet and outlet fitting of typical 0.7 bar to 2.75 bar
VALVE_DRIVE_LEVEL: 0 .. 100% (in 10E-4 steps), 0% = valve is closed, 100% = valve is in purge position (full open)

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Valve sticking, clogged, contaminated, corroded. Check compatibility of the process gas with materials wetted (corrosion is typically also visible inside the process fittings)

degradation_mechanisms.rate_description: Span: 0.05% S.P. per oC, Zero: 0.005% F.S. per oC
degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Temperature Coefficient: Span: 0.05% S.P. per oC, Zero: 0.005% F.S. per oC

fault_conditions.name: controller_error
fault_conditions.symptoms: abs (setp - flow) greater for a longer time period
fault_conditions.evidence: CONTROLLER_ERROR: abs (setp - flow) greater for a longer time period

maintenance_actions.name: zero_adjustment
maintenance_actions.evidence: To achieve optimum accuracy and reliability, periodically check zero readout and readjust if necessary

maintenance_actions.name: annual_recalibration
maintenance_actions.what_it_resets: flow measurement accuracy and valve performance
maintenance_actions.evidence: Recommended: Annual maintenance and recalibration at MKS service center if nothing else specified

maintenance_actions.name: autozero
maintenance_actions.evidence: AUTOZERO: 0 to 1 transition activates zeroing if (VALVE_OVERRIDE==FLOW_OFF && FLOW_SETPOINT < 5%FS)

maintenance_actions.name: totalizer_reset
maintenance_actions.evidence: RESET_TOTALIZER: 0 to 1 transition resets totalizer to zero

assumptions.statement: Valve switches off below 1% setpoint and on above 2% setpoint
Standard reference gas is nitrogen for flow rate specifications
assumptions.reason: All flow ranges specified as N₂ equivalent in manual
